<!-- Title: Use an imperative verb format — Add X / Fix Y / Remove Z / Update X / Refactor X -->

## What
<!-- A clear description of what this PR does. -->

## Why
<!-- The reason this change is needed. State it directly. -->

## How it works
<!-- Optional: explain implementation details if the approach isn't obvious from the diff. -->

## Out of scope
<!-- Optional: things intentionally not included in this PR and why. -->

## Testing
<!-- Describe how this was tested, or note if no new tests were needed and why. -->

## Closes
<!-- Required: every PR must reference at least one issue. -->
<!-- List each issue on its own line — GitHub only links the first issue when comma-separated. -->
- Closes #<issue-number>
